final_positions.rationale: Overheat regime, DFF 4.33%, 1M yield 4.38%. Short-end offers carry with minimal duration risk. Shallow 10Y-3M inversion (-0.05%) supports front-end allocation. HTM.
3M yield 4.34%, near 1M level. Balanced carry and liquidity. Late-cycle environment warrants short-end bias. HTM.
6M yield 4.27%, extends duration slightly while maintaining carry. Bridges short-to-mid curve. HTM.
1Y yield 4.02%, upper bound of short-end allocation. Avoids 2Y–10Y due to flat curve and late-cycle inversion signal. HTM.

Overheat regime with shallow 10Y-3M inversion (-0.09%) and compressed HY OAS (3.17%) support short-end carry deployment. 3M yield 4.33% (near 1M level) offers attractive carry with minimal duration risk. Late-cycle environment (2Y-1Y slope -0.11%) warrants front-end bias. HTM.

6M yield 4.27% extends duration slightly while maintaining carry. Bridges short-to-mid curve without exposing to 2Y+ flattening risk. Late-cycle inversion signal (10Y-3M -0.09%) supports front-end allocation. HTM.
